package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"io"
)

// scenario for repeated_json_marshaling: encoding/json.Marshal or MarshalIndent inside loops - repeated allocation and serialization hot spots.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule631NegativeRecord struct { Name string `json:"name"`; Count int `json:"count"` }

func scenario631Negative(writer io.Writer, value Rule631NegativeRecord) error {
	return json.NewEncoder(writer).Encode(value)
}
